## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential full stack engineering role at growthx.ai with Jacopo Beschi](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai has two main products: Atlas (internal content creation tool) and Check That (competitor analysis tool)](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Tech stack includes Rails, React, TypeScript, and a custom AI workflow framework](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Company is growing rapidly and looking to standardize processes and tooling](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
  - [Role would involve both product engineering and helping improve developer experience/tooling](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9550.0)
  - [Flexible start date possible, with ideal timing around early November before another engineer goes on leave](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10286.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Products

  - [Two main products: Atlas (internal content tool) and Check That (competitor analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Using Rails, React, TypeScript stack](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Custom AI workflow framework built on Temporal](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Growing rapidly, currently at break-even financially](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10746.0)
  - [Considering Series B funding to prepare for potential market changes](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10769.0)

### Engineering Team Structure and Processes

  - [Three main teams: AI framework, client-facing, and product](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=8196.0)
  - [Using 4-week cycles with 2 week cooldowns for product work](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=8430.0)
  - [Flexible PTO policy, aiming for at least 15 days taken per year](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10449.0)
  - [Async communication emphasized](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10725.0)
  - [On-call rotations still being formalized as team grows](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9890.0)

### Potential Role and Responsibilities

  - [Full stack engineering across Rails and React codebases](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Help standardize API client usage across products](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
  - [Review architecture decisions and large PRs](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9700.0)
  - [Potentially assist with AI framework development](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9527.0)
  - [Support Check That launch and backfill for engineer going on leave](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9550.0)

### Development Practices and Tooling

  - [Mac-based development environment](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9000.0)
  - [Mix of Docker and local setups, opportunity to improve onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9167.0)
  - [Using Linear for project management](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=8556.0)
  - [Cloud Code for AI-assisted development](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [Render for hosting, may move to AWS in future](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=9469.0)

### Compensation and Benefits

  - [Aiming for San Francisco-level salaries](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10714.0)
  - [Stock options offered](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10739.0)
  - [Flexible PTO policy](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10449.0)
  - [Potential for remote work](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10415.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to send offer, likely within next day](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=8118.0)
  - [Discuss potential start date, ideally early November](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10286.0)
  - [Jacopo to consider length of break needed before starting](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=10286.0)
  - [Follow up on any remaining questions about role or company](https://fathom.video/share/SD6Jnjzj3zDco4r1p3mP2eKt-UTQQ7sE?tab=summary&timestamp=11040.0)
